title: UPSC CDS I Result 2026
short_information: Union Public Service Commission (UPSC) has released Combined Defence Services Exam First Examination 2026 Notification. Those candidates who are Enrolled in this UPSC CDS I Vacancy 2026 can Download Result. Read the notification for recruitment eligibility, post information, selection procedure, pay scale and all other information. Union Public Service Commission UPSC CDS I Recruitment 2026 UPSC CDS I Advt No. 04/2026 : Short Details of Notification
application_fee: General / OBC / EWS : 100/- SC / ST : 0/- Female : 0/- Pay the Examination Fee Through Cast at E Challan or Debit Card, Credit Card, Net Banking UPSC CDS I
